query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `course_exam_questions` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `course_id` int NOT NULL,
  `question_type` enum('mcq','true_false') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'mcq',
  `question_text_en` text NOT NULL,
  `question_text_ar` text NOT NULL,
  `options` json NOT NULL,
  `correct_option_id` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `explanation_en` text,
  `explanation_ar` text,
  `difficulty` enum('medium','hard','expert') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'hard',
  `time_limit_seconds` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 60,
  `order` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_course_id` (`course_id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `course_exam_attempts` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `course_id` int NOT NULL,
  `score_percent` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `passed` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `answers` json,
  `time_taken_seconds` int,
  `started_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `completed_at` datetime,
  `next_allowed_at` datetime,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_user_course` (`user_id`, `course_id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `course_certificates` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `course_id` int NOT NULL,
  `attempt_id` int NOT NULL,
  `score_percent` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL,
  `verification_code` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `issued_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_user_course` (`user_id`, `course_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_verification_code` (`verification_code`)
);
